modules.name: Nacre
modules.description: Granular audio processor inspired by Mutable Instruments Beads

modules.name: Orrery
modules.description: Orrery: dual function generator (Maths-inspired slopes, cycling, sum/or bus)

modules.name: Stiletto
modules.description: Stereo dual high-pass/low-pass filter inspired by Shakmat Dual Dagger

modules.name: Ammonite
modules.description: Clocked multi-line stereo delay network inspired by Qu-Bit Nautilus

modules.name: Bitrot
modules.description: Circuit-bent stereo buffer corrupter inspired by Qu-Bit Data Bender

modules.name: Sirocco
modules.description: Live granular processor with melodic and rhythmic grain controls, inspired by Qu-Bit Mojave

modules.name: Espalier
modules.description: Three-channel generative fractal sequencer inspired by Qu-Bit Bloom v2

modules.name: Tektite
modules.description: Stereo varispeed performance looper inspired by Qu-Bit Stardust

modules.name: Haymaker
modules.description: 12-pad sampler groovebox with step sequencer and punch-in FX, inspired by compact pad samplers

modules.name: Maelstrom
modules.description: Voltage-controlled pitch-shifting echo inspired by Make Noise Echophon

modules.name: Chimera
modules.description: Splice-based loop sampler with granular time-stretch, clock sync, scatter, EQ, and sound-on-sound

modules.name: Catgut
modules.description: Dual-voice 32-string polyphonic Karplus-Strong synthesizer inspired by Strymon SuperKar+

modules.name: Capo
modules.description: Four-voice polyphonic chord oscillator with wavetable banks and auto-harmonization, inspired by Qu-Bit Chord v2

modules.name: Fretwork
modules.description: Polyphonic performance quantizer with scale presets, diatonic transpose CV, and note-change gates

modules.name: Murmur
modules.description: Polyphonic macro oscillator: 16 voices of the open-source Plaits DSP by Emilie Gillet

modules.name: Fieldfare
modules.description: Pocket-studio workstation: synth engines, 4-track varispeed tape, endless sequencer (OP-1 field inspired)

modules.name: Osprey
modules.description: Triple-mode stereo oscillator: traditional pair, 24-osc swarm, 20-chord engine

modules.name: Foxglove
modules.description: Stereo multimode VA filter: ladder, Sallen-Key, state variable with BP-LP-HP morph

modules.name: Remora
modules.description: 32-program stereo multi-FX: delays, shifters, filters, lo-fi, reverbs
